dailyNews.description: The operation to extract him from the ground in hostile territory was hugely complex and involved multiple US government agencies.

dailyNews.description: The seat was vacant after the constituency’s elected MLA and the deputy Chief Minister of the State Ajit Pawar died tragically in a plane crash

dailyNews.title: Polymarket took down wagers tied to rescue of downed Air Force officer
dailyNews.description: A Democratic congressman had harsh criticism for Polymarket for allowing users to bet on the date the U.S. would confirm the rescue of Air Force service members shot down over Iran.

A Congress veteran calls for making the party a people’s movement
dailyNews.description: Dhanuskodi Athithan, a long-standing Congress leader and former Union Minister of State for Youth Affairs and Sport, wants the party to do field work and take up people’s issues. “Look at Tirunelveli and Kanniyakumari districts where the party is still strong. This is because of this approach,” he points out

dailyNews.title: A debate on the tenure of Election Commission-appointed police chief
dailyNews.description: However, the EC order did not specify a tenure for him. The question is whether Mr. Rathore would be entitled to a minimum two-year tenure, as mandated by the Supreme Court in the  landmark Prakash Singh case. However, this ruling applies only to appointments made through the UPSC-led process

dailyNews.title: Trump’s ticking clock: New deadline for Iran as threat of devastating strikes looms over Hormuz blockade
dailyNews.description: Trump’s messaging reflects a dual strategy — signaling openness to a deal while maintaining the threat of sweeping military action — leaving the coming hours critical in determining whether diplomacy prevails or conflict escalates further.

dailyNews.title: US Almost Did Not Rescue Its F-15 Airman Thinking It Was An Iranian Trap
dailyNews.description: The F-15E was shot down over southwestern Iran on Friday, the first confirmed loss of a US combat aircraft inside Iran since the war began.

dailyNews.title: US Inflation Seen Spiking In First Snapshot Since Iran War
dailyNews.description: OPEC+ warned on Sunday that damage to Middle East energy assets will have a prolonged impact on oil supply even after the Iran war ends

dailyNews.title: ‘We sent guns to the protesters…Kurds took them’: Trump’s explosive claim; alleges Iran ‘slaughtered’ 45,000 protesters
dailyNews.description: Trump alleged that the Iranian government “slaughtered” 45,000 people during recent anti-regime protests. However, no official figures have been released by Iran, with estimates from activists and reports varying widely.

dailyNews.description: The threats followed the extraction of a US Air Force weapons systems officer whose F-15E Strike Eagle aircraft was downed inside Iran

dailyNews.title: BJP, Assam CM hit back after Congress alleges Himanta's wife holds three passports, vows legal action
dailyNews.description: Assam Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma and his wife vehemently rejected Congress's allegations regarding false passports and overseas assets.

dailyNews.title: OPEC+ agrees to hike oil output, warns of slow recovery after attacks
dailyNews.description: The rise is largely symbolic as some key members are unable to raise ​production amid the US-Israel war on Iran.

dailyNews.title: US Secret Service Probes Reports Of Overnight Gunfire Near White House
dailyNews.description: The US Secret Service said Sunday it was investigating reports of overnight gunfire near Lafayette Park, which is across the street from the White House.

dailyNews.title: Stephen Miller Is Still Pursuing His Immigration Agenda, but More Quietly
dailyNews.description: The architect of President Trump’s mass deportation campaign wants “a moratorium on immigration from third world countries until we can heal ourselves as a nation.” The chaos in Minneapolis has not pushed him off that course.

dailyNews.title: White House faith advisor says Americans are leaving organized religion but not losing faith in God
dailyNews.description: Paula White-Cain delivers an Easter message of hope and redemption while pushing back on data showing declining religious affiliation in the U.S.

dailyNews.title: NASA chief Jared Isaacman says Artemis II would not be possible 'if it wasn't for President Trump'
dailyNews.description: NASA administrator Jared Isaacman says Artemis II would not be at this moment without President Trump as Orion prepares to pass the far side of the Moon.

dailyNews.title: Trump admin urges restoring ballroom construction in emergency motion: 'Time is of the essence'
dailyNews.description: Trump administration files emergency motion to overturn a judge's ruling halting White House ballroom construction, citing security and safety concerns.

dailyNews.title: "WE GOT HIM!," Trump declares after U.S. airman rescued deep inside Iran
dailyNews.description: As the Iran war passes the five-week mark, President Trump hailed the rescue of a U.S. airman who was missing for days inside Iran — and threatened to hit power plants if Iran doesn't let the Strait of Hormuz open.

dailyNews.title: Missing U.S. crew member from downed fighter jet rescued in Iran, Trump says
dailyNews.description: A U.S. crew member who went missing when an F-15E fighter jet was shot down over a remote area of Iran has been rescued by U.S. forces.

dailyNews.title: Trump vows Iran will be 'living in Hell' by Tuesday if Strait of Hormuz deadline missed
dailyNews.description: "Tuesday will be Power Plant Day, and Bridge Day, all wrapped up in one, in Iran. There will be nothing like it!!!" Trump said in a Truth Social post.

dailyNews.title: Warsh nomination moves ahead, putting Trump's competing Fed plans on a collision course
dailyNews.description: A Senate committee will consider Kevin Warsh's nomination even as one of its members still plans to block it.

dailyNews.title: Trump tariff fallout: Some industries grapple with lingering effects one year later
dailyNews.description: A year after his "liberation day," Trump's trade war has reshaped how companies in industries such as retail and autos are modeling economic and policy risk.

dailyNews.title: Iran live updates: Trump says 'we're blowing up' Iran if no peace deal in 48 hours
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.
